name: pr_description_escalate
description: A PR_DESCRIPTION comment — free leaves the PR body untouched (the auto-rewrite is paid) and surfaces it to the human, who does not answer, so the loop hands the PR back.

rounds.body: the PR description still lists the old /v1/upload endpoint; the diff moved it to /v2/upload
rounds.classifier_response: {"label": "PR_DESCRIPTION", "bot": "claude", "model": "sonnet", "effort": "low", "severity": "low", "reason": "PR body names the old endpoint; update the description"}
